name: Stefan Maron PTE non-schema deletion rules
description: Downgrades deletion rules for non-schema objects to Warning. Schema-affecting deletions (AS0001, AS0002, AS0009, AS0010, AS0043) are intentionally excluded and remain Errors. PTEs can legitimately remove UI elements and code objects without risking data loss or deployment failures.

rules.justification: Pages and page extensions can be removed in PTEs without schema risk.
Actions can be removed in PTEs without schema risk.
Controls can be removed in PTEs without schema risk.
Views can be removed in PTEs without schema risk.
Interface implementations can be removed in PTEs without schema risk.
Interfaces can be removed in PTEs without schema risk.
Code objects with IDs (codeunits, reports, queries, enums) can be removed in PTEs without schema risk.
Code objects without IDs that can be referenced can be removed in PTEs without schema risk.
